reviewed_terms.label: hasOutputData
reviewed_terms.description: An object property relating a measurement or process to data generated as an output.

reviewed_terms.label: hasInputData
reviewed_terms.description: An object property relating a process or measurement to data used as an input.

reviewed_terms.label: Oxygen Gain/Loss Measurement
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses oxygen Gain/Loss measurement to determine Local Oxygen Transport Resistance, Limiting Current Density, and Local Gas Transport Resistance using Fuel Cell Test Station and Gas Humidification Unit and generating Experiment Dataset and Local Oxygen Transport Resistance Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: O2–N2 Switching Measurement
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses O2–N2 switching measurement to determine Local Oxygen Transport Resistance using Fuel Cell Test Station and Gas Humidification Unit and generating Experiment Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: Through-Plane Gas Transport Measurement
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses Through-Plane gas transport measurement to determine Local Oxygen Transport Resistance, Effective Oxygen Diffusion Coefficient, and Mass Transport Resistance using Through-Plane Transport Cell and Environmental Chamber and generating Experiment Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: Current-Interrupt HFR Measurement
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses Current-Interrupt HFR measurement to determine Ohmic Resistance and High Frequency Resistance using Fuel Cell Test Station and Milli Ohmmeter and generating Experiment Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: ofProperty
reviewed_terms.description: An object property relating a data point to the property represented by that data point.

reviewed_terms.label: fromMeasurement
reviewed_terms.description: An object property relating a data point to the measurement from which it was generated.

reviewed_terms.label: MEA Polarization
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that records membrane electrode assembly polarization behavior to determine current density, power density, mass activity, and related electrochemical performance properties under controlled operating conditions.

reviewed_terms.label: hasIdentifier
reviewed_terms.description: A datatype property relating a resource to a literal identifier used to distinguish or reference it.

reviewed_terms.label: Square Wave Voltammetry
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses square wave voltammetry to determine Peak Current and Peak Potential using Electrochemical Workstation and generating Experiment Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: Agent
reviewed_terms.description: A class representing an agent that is responsible for carrying out a process, producing data, or contributing to the provenance of a resource in H2KG.

reviewed_terms.label: atCurrentDensity
reviewed_terms.description: An object property relating a data point to the current-density value at which it is reported.

reviewed_terms.label: Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses electrochemical impedance spectroscopy potentiostatic to determine Charge Transfer Resistance, Double Layer Capacitance, and Ohmic Resistance using Electrochemical Workstation, Potentiostat, and Segmented Cell System and generating Experiment Dataset, Impedance Dataset, and EIS Nyquist Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: Rotating Ring Disk Voltammetry
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses rotating ring disk voltammetry to determine Current Density, Kinetic Current, and Electron Transfer Number using Electrochemical Workstation, RRDEAssembly, and Glassy Carbon Disk Electrode and generating Experiment Dataset and Limiting Current Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: Process
reviewed_terms.description: A class representing a process that transforms material, produces data, or changes the state of a system in H2KG.

reviewed_terms.label: Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Galvanostatic
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses electrochemical impedance spectroscopy galvanostatic to determine Charge Transfer Resistance, Double Layer Capacitance, and Ohmic Resistance using Electrochemical Workstation, Potentiostat, and Fuel Cell Test Station and generating Experiment Dataset, Impedance Dataset, and EIS Nyquist Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: Cyclic Voltammetry
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses cyclic voltammetry to determine Double Layer Capacitance, Electrochemically Active Surface Area, and Onset Potential using Electrochemical Workstation, Potentiostat, and Fuel Cell Test Station and generating Experiment Dataset, ECSA Dataset, and Cyclic Voltammogram Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: Experiment Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: A dataset containing experiment data generated by Oxygen Gain/Loss Measurement, O2–N2 Switching Measurement, and Through-Plane Gas Transport Measurement.

reviewed_terms.label: ECSA by Double-Layer Capacitance
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that determines electrochemically active surface area from double-layer capacitance measurements using an electrochemical workstation and generating an experiment dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: hasQuantityValue
reviewed_terms.description: An object property relating a parameter, property, or data point to the quantity value that expresses it.

reviewed_terms.label: Data
reviewed_terms.description: A class representing data produced, used, or referenced by a process or measurement in H2KG.

reviewed_terms.label: Data Point
reviewed_terms.description: A class representing a single data point that links a value to the property and measurement context it belongs to in H2KG.

reviewed_terms.label: Linear Sweep Voltammetry
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses linear sweep voltammetry to determine Current Density, Tafel Slope, and Overpotential using Electrochemical Workstation, Potentiostat, and RDERotator and generating Experiment Dataset and Polarization Curve Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: Metadata
reviewed_terms.description: A class representing metadata used to describe the provenance, identity, structure, or context of another resource in H2KG.

reviewed_terms.label: Cathodic Stripping Voltammetry
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses cathodic stripping voltammetry to determine Cathodic Stripping Peak Current and Peak Potential using Electrochemical Workstation and generating Experiment Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: ECSA Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: A dataset containing ECSA data generated by Catalyst Ink Preparation, Cyclic Voltammetry, and Carbon Monoxide Stripping Voltammetry.

reviewed_terms.label: Impedance Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: A dataset containing impedance data generated by Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic, Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Galvanostatic, and Proton Conductivity Measurement.

reviewed_terms.label: Limiting Current Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Limiting current values and derived O2 transport resistances vs pressure and O2 concentration.

reviewed_terms.label: Polarization Curve Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Polarization curves (U-I / I-V) measured at different RH and degradation states.

reviewed_terms.label: Ionomer Dispersion Property Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: A dataset containing ionomer dispersion property data generated by Ionomer Dispersion Property Compilation.

reviewed_terms.label: Solvent Physical Property Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: A dataset containing solvent physical property data generated by Rheology Measurement, Solvent Physical Property Compilation, and Solvent Property Lookup.

reviewed_terms.label: Ionomer Dispersion Property Compilation
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses ionomer dispersion property compilation to determine Alcohol Mass Fraction In Solvent Mixture, Ion Exchange Capacity, and Ionomer Dispersion Mass Fraction and generating Ionomer Dispersion Property Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: Solvent Physical Property Compilation
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses solvent physical property compilation to determine Boiling Point, Dielectric Constant, and Hansen Solubility Parameter Dispersion using Rheometer and generating Solvent Physical Property Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: Carbon Mass
reviewed_terms.description: Metadata corresponding to carbon mass and used to describe the provenance, identity, or context of another resource.

reviewed_terms.label: Membrane Thickness Measurement
reviewed_terms.description: Measurement/record of membrane thickness (e.g., micrometer); reported ~80 µm.

reviewed_terms.label: PEMFCCFD Simulation
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses PEMFCCFD simulation to determine Oxygen Concentration, Current Density Per Pt Surface Area, and Low Activity Pt Particle Fraction using Ansys Fluent Fuel Cell Module and Comsol Multiphysics and generating Polarization Curve Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: DRT Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Dataset containing calculated DRT spectra (e.g., G(f) vs frequency) and derived peak features from impedance spectra.

reviewed_terms.label: Local Oxygen Transport Resistance Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: A dataset containing local oxygen transport resistance data generated by Oxygen Gain/Loss Measurement and Limiting Current Measurement.

reviewed_terms.label: Review Statement Extraction
reviewed_terms.description: Use for numeric values stated in review text (targets/ranges) rather than newly measured data.

reviewed_terms.label: Agglomerate Size Distribution Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: A dataset containing agglomerate size distribution data generated by Dynamic Light Scattering Measurement, Laser Diffraction Scattering Particle Size Measurement, and Ultra Small Angle X Ray Scattering Measurement.

reviewed_terms.label: Pore Size Distribution Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: A dataset containing pore size distribution data generated by Nitrogen Physisorption Measurement and Mercury Intrusion Porosimetry Measurement.

reviewed_terms.label: SEM Image Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: A dataset containing SEM image data generated by SEM Imaging Measurement and Energy Dispersive X Ray Spectroscopy.

reviewed_terms.label: SEM Micrograph Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: A dataset containing SEM micrograph data generated by SEM Imaging Measurement.

reviewed_terms.label: Fuel Cell Polarization Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: A dataset containing fuel cell polarization data generated by MEAPolarization and Fuel Cell Polarization Measurement.

reviewed_terms.label: EIS Nyquist Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: A dataset containing EIS nyquist data generated by Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Potentiostatic and Electrochemical Impedance Spectroscopy Galvanostatic.

reviewed_terms.label: Cyclic Voltammogram Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: A dataset containing cyclic voltammogram data generated by Cyclic Voltammetry.

reviewed_terms.label: High Speed Video Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Dataset of recorded high-speed video frames during printing.

reviewed_terms.label: Image Width Pixels
reviewed_terms.description: A parameter specifying image width in pixels for recorded frames.

reviewed_terms.label: Image Height Pixels
reviewed_terms.description: A parameter specifying image height in pixels for recorded frames.

reviewed_terms.label: Solvent Property Measurement
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses solvent property measurement to determine Dielectric Constant, Boiling Point, and Viscosity using Ubbelohde Viscometer, Tensiometer, and Contact Angle Goniometer and generating Solvent Physical Property Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: XPS Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: A dataset containing XPS data generated by X Ray Photoelectron Spectroscopy Measurement.

reviewed_terms.label: Radius Of Gyration
reviewed_terms.description: A property denoting radius of gyration (Rg) of ink aggregates/agglomerates extracted from Guinier fits to USAXS data.

reviewed_terms.label: Intrinsic Viscosity
reviewed_terms.description: A parameter specifying intrinsic viscosity parameter from Krieger–Dougherty fit to high-shear relative viscosity data.

reviewed_terms.label: Catalyst Ink Structure Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: A dataset containing catalyst ink structure data generated by Catalyst Ink Preparation, Dynamic Light Scattering Measurement, and Contrast Variation SANSUSANS Measurement.

reviewed_terms.label: Acid Uptake Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Dataset of QCM-measured mass uptake and derived proton concentration vs dopant concentration.

reviewed_terms.label: Swelling Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Dataset of swelling fraction vs RH and dopant concentration from ellipsometry.

reviewed_terms.label: Conductivity Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Dataset of thin-film conductivity vs RH, thickness, and dopant concentration.

reviewed_terms.label: Rapid Cool Down Activation
reviewed_terms.description: Break-in method combining operation with rapid cool-down below dew point to condense liquid water.

reviewed_terms.label: Surface Topography Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Processed 3D surface topography (height map) reconstructed from profilometry or microscopy data.

reviewed_terms.label: Organic Flow Battery Polarization Measurement
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses organic flow battery polarization measurement to determine Power Density, Peak Power Density, and Open Circuit Voltage using Battery Analyzer and Diaphragm Pump and generating Polarization Curve Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: Galvanostatic Charge Discharge Measurement
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses galvanostatic charge discharge measurement to determine Coulombic Efficiency, Energy Efficiency, and Ohmic Resistance using Battery Analyzer, Electrochemical Workstation, and Ag/AgCl and generating Charge Discharge Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: Charge Discharge Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: A dataset containing charge discharge data generated by Galvanostatic Charge Discharge Measurement.

reviewed_terms.label: In Plane Electronic Conductivity Measurement
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses in plane electronic conductivity measurement to determine In Plane Electronic Conductivity using Micro Ohm Meter and Digital Multimeter and generating Conductivity Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: Through Plane Electronic Conductivity Measurement
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that uses through plane electronic conductivity measurement to determine Through Plane Electronic Conductivity, Scaling Exponent T, and Electrical Percolation Threshold Volume Fraction using Micro Ohm Meter, Gold Plated Probes, and Pneumatic Jack and generating Conductivity Dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: In Plane Effective Diffusivity Measurement
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process that determines the in-plane effective oxygen diffusion coefficient from radial oxygen-transport measurements using a fiber-optic oxygen probe and generating oxygen concentration time-series data.

reviewed_terms.label: Oxygen Concentration Time Series Data
reviewed_terms.description: A data resource used to represent oxygen concentration time series data generated by In Plane Effective Diffusivity Measurement.

reviewed_terms.label: Differential Scanning Calorimetry Measurement
reviewed_terms.description: A measurement process used to determine thermal event peak temperature and phase transition temperature by differential scanning calorimetry, typically using a differential scanning calorimeter, DSC instrument, or synchronous thermal analyzer, and generating a thermal analysis dataset.

reviewed_terms.label: Rheology Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Dataset of dynamic rheology and curing-time photorheology measurements (frequency sweeps and modulus evolution).

reviewed_terms.label: FTIR Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Dataset of FTIR spectra versus UV exposure time and versus pyrolysis temperature.

reviewed_terms.label: Thermal Analysis Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Dataset of DSC and TG curves during thermal treatment.

reviewed_terms.label: XRD Pattern Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Dataset of XRD diffractograms versus sintering temperature.

reviewed_terms.label: Microstructure Image Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Dataset of microscopy images before/after pyrolysis and at various sintering temperatures.

reviewed_terms.label: ORR Performance Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Electrochemical ORR activity and stability data for SG-Fe compared with Pt/C in 0.1 M KOH.

reviewed_terms.label: Porous Ceramic Property Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Dataset of porous ceramic properties across processing conditions.

reviewed_terms.label: DRM Performance Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Dataset of DRM catalytic performance (conversions, etc.).

reviewed_terms.label: OER Performance Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Dataset containing OER performance metrics (current density vs potential, overpotential, Tafel slope).

reviewed_terms.label: Photodegradation Dataset
reviewed_terms.description: Dataset containing RhB concentration/degradation vs irradiation time and kinetic analysis.

reviewed_terms.label: Plateau Storage Modulus
reviewed_terms.description: A property denoting plateau (low-strain) storage modulus extrapolated from 0.01–0.03% strain data.

reviewed_terms.label: Geometric Area
reviewed_terms.description: Metadata corresponding to geometric area and used to describe the provenance, identity, or context of another resource.

guidance.hdo_role: Primary alignment source for Helmholtz-community data, metadata, identifier, digital-object, information-profile, schema, validation, and provenance-record concepts.

division_of_labor.hdo: Digital asset, metadata management, identifier, validation, and information-governance concepts.
division_of_labor.emmo: Scientific, process, material, and electrochemistry semantics.
division_of_labor.qudt: Quantity kinds, quantity values, and units.

cache_note: Direct HDO term reuse becomes stronger when a real HDO cache file is available at cache/sources/hdo.ttl.
